text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day. I pay a trip to the shrine to
pray for Air Shakur's success in her senior year.
choice_data_list: (I hope she gets everything she desires.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finished that important task, I decide to
enjoy a leisurely stroll back to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh.
choice_data_list: Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sure, you too.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, isn't that Air Shakur? Even her regular clothes are
flashy...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: I wonder if her results will be as flashy as Opera O's.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's pulling quite a face, but at least she isn't as
torn up about the gossip as she was after the
Japan Cup. She seems a little calmer now.
choice_data_list: Are you on your way back?
Are you on your way back?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No, I've only just come out.
choice_data_list: Where are you going?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: None of your business.
choice_data_list: I bet I'll find out if I go with you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How did I know you'd say that...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I don't care what you do, as long as you don't
hassle me.
choice_data_list: Really? Yes!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's probably going to be crowded anyway. It's not
like one more person's gonna make it any worse.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But if you come with me, I don't want you
bugging me about it later. Avoiding that's half
the reason I'm letting you come.
choice_data_list: And what exactly are we doing?
And what exactly are we doing?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This and that. I'm thinkin' I might listen to a talk
on music or math, or maybe check out the event
race.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not dragging you around all day. You can
tag along for one thing. Take your pick.
choice_data_list: Let's go to the music event.
Let's go to the math lecture.
Let's go to the New Year's race.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sure, that's fine. Just keep it together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur and I check out a casual outdoor
festival. There are a number of food stalls and the
atmosphere is festive.
choice_data_list: So you like this kind of thing, huh?
So you like this kind of thing, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't be here without a reason. But...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes the music just forces its way into my
head. On the rare occasions something resonates
with me, it's actually quite nice.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah, there it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A melodic electronic hum drifts into my ears. The
fleeting melody almost seems to dissipate into
the afternoon sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur usually listens to hip-hop, but it seems
she has a broader taste in music than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I've discovered how diverse Air Shakur's
tastes are.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
For real? I'm pretty sure you're not into that kind
of thing.
choice_data_list: Nah, it sounds interesting.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well, it might be just the thing for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur takes me to a math seminar aimed at
middle and high school students, delivered by a
famous mathematician.
choice_data_list: Isn't this going to be a little too easy for you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There aren't that many chances to see someone
like him talk in Japan.
choice_data_list: Is he really that incredible?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, he won an award for mathematics. His work
from around that time is ridiculously interesting.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm hoping he'll talk about something interesting,
like his research from that time or something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears she really respects this person. And so,
the lecture begins...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That was good. He's just as amazing as I
thought...
choice_data_list: He made it really easy to understand as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. He's really passionate about
math education, so I bet he takes that into
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: He's the complete opposite of my old man.
choice_data_list: Oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
He's a mathematician too—a researcher to the
very core.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm heading back. I'm glad we came.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You really want to watch a race on your day off?
choice_data_list: Yeah. I like racing.
Yeah. I like racing.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Right...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess it's better than goin' anywhere else.
Just business as usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a special race today called the New Year's
Special Event Race, when Umamusume children
race and then put on a concert.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Number one's got some legs on her. Two'd do
better if she worked on her stamina.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As for three... she needs to change up her training
methods. Now, if I was training her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur watches the children as they try their
best, evaluating each one in turn. It looks like
she's having fun.
choice_data_list: Do you like kids?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Do I look like I like kids?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't hurt yourself thinking about it. I don't feel
any particular way about them.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But running techniques are always evolving. Even
the racecourses are changing.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's important for me to see it with my own eyes.
choice_data_list: You're searching for the future, right?
You're searching for the future, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Quit it with the cheesy nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Look, it's startin'.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads off to finish up her remaining plans for
the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she's finished, I suspect she'll continue her
preparations for senior year.
choice_data_list: (I've gotta do my best too.)
(I've gotta do my best too.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we start the new year with a positive
outlook.
